message:
Fix critical crypto and web viewer bugs

Fixes for encryption/decryption interoperability:
- crypto_worker.js: Fix HKDF info string mismatch ('cass-recovery-kek' -> 'cass-pages-kek-v2')
- crypto_worker.js: Fix chunk AAD missing SCHEMA_VERSION byte (20 -> 21 bytes)

Web viewer fixes:
- conversation.js: Fix CSP violation (remove inline onclick, use addEventListener)
- conversation.js: Add virtual scrolling for long conversations (50+ messages)
- sw.js: Fix MessageChannel response routing (use event.ports[0] when available)

These bugs would have caused recovery secret unlock and chunk decryption
to fail due to mismatched cryptographic parameters between Rust and JS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
